fields.title: Consolidate tau extensions into single vertical-slice architecture
fields.description:
Refactor tau from 8 separate pi extensions into a single unified extension with vertical-slice architecture.

## Current State
- 8 separate extensions: beads, editor-hub, exa, sandbox, skill-marker, task, tau (misc)
- Each with own package.json and pi.extensions entry
- editor-hub is a workaround for cross-extension editor coordination
- Extensions can't easily share state or call each other

## Target State
- Single extensions/tau/ with vertical-slice folder structure
- Each feature in its own folder with index.ts (Rust mod.rs pattern)
- Shared state in shared/ folder
- Single TauEditor with all customizations baked in
- No runtime plugin registry - compile-time composition

## Structure
```
extensions/tau/src/
├── index.ts           # only file in root
├── shared/            # state.ts, config.ts
├── editor/            # TauEditor
├── beads/
├── exa/
├── skill-marker/
├── terminal-prompt/
├── worked-for/
├── status/
├── commit/
├── sandbox/
└── task/
```

## Dependencies to merge
- ajv, ajv-formats (from task)
- @anthropic-ai/sandbox-runtime (from sandbox)

## DoD
- Single tau extension in extensions/tau/
- All features working as before
- Old extension folders deleted
- install-extensions.sh updated
- Tool names unchanged (bd, bash, edit, write, task, web_search_exa, etc.)
fields.close_reason: Completed consolidation into single extensions/tau with vertical-slice structure; removed legacy extensions and updated installer
